items.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
items.description: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.

items.title: 'Everyone knows somebody affected' - small Canadian town united in grief after mass shooting
items.description: The shooting in British Columbia has been met with shock and sadness, with residents saying nearly everyone has been impacted in some way.

items.title: South Africa to deploy troops to tackle crime gangs
items.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa says the army will work with the police to fight organised crime and illegal mining.

items.title: FBI releases description of suspect in Nancy Guthrie kidnapping
items.description: The 84-year-old mother of news anchor Savannah Guthrie disappeared from her Arizona home two weeks ago.

items.title: Trump revokes landmark ruling that greenhouse gases endanger public health
items.description: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.
